name: Spider Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 metal bowls (one bigger than the other)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven according to cake mix instructions.
2. Pour cake mix into the larger bowl and bake.
3. Pour cake mix into the smaller bowl and bake.
4. Allow cakes to cool completely.
5. Cut the larger cake horizontally in half.
6. Carefully scoop out an adequate cavity in each half of the larger cake.
7. Fill cavities with well-whipped green Jello.
8. Reattach the halves of the larger cake.
9. Frost entire Spider Cake black.
10. Arrange on serving platter.
11. Use licorice sticks as legs, placing them evenly spaced around the base.
12. Place 2 big green gumdrops and 6 small green gumdrops in the center for eyes.
13. When cutting into the cake, it will spur out a green gooey substance resembling what you might see when a spider is stepped on.
